name: Salesforce Org (YAML)
description: A Salesforce org as config-as-code: objects with fields, validation rules, picklist value sets, a role hierarchy, profiles, and users — the metadata admins normally click together, schema-routed and cross-checked.
suggestedPrompts: Add a Stage picklist field to the Opportunity object
Which users are assigned the System Administrator profile?
Find fields whose value set does not exist
Add an Account Executive role under VP of Sales
